summary: Card Management and Ride Creation with Saved Cards - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 18/18 tests. Frontend: All key flows verified. Card management (add/delete via profile), ride creation with saved card selector, self-registration all working correctly.

partner_auth.test_partner_login_success: PASS - Returns token and partner object
partner_auth.test_partner_register_new_account: PASS - Self-registration creates partner + C# account, auto-login works

card_management.test_get_cards_empty_for_new_partner: PASS - Returns empty array for new partner
card_management.test_get_cards_for_existing_partner: PASS - Returns saved cards array with id, pm_id, brand
card_management.test_cards_setup_intent: PASS - Returns Stripe clientSecret (seti_*) from C# API
card_management.test_cards_save: PASS - Saves card to partner's saved_cards array
card_management.test_cards_delete: PASS - Removes card from saved_cards, verified card not in list
card_management.test_cards_requires_auth: PASS - All cards endpoints return 401 without auth

ride_creation.test_create_ride_with_card_id: PASS - Creates ride with card_id, submits to C# if token available

vehicle_and_route.test_get_vehicle_categories: PASS - Returns normalized [{id, name}] from C# API
vehicle_and_route.test_calculate_route: PASS - Returns distance and duration from Google API

elements_verified: Login form: email, password, submit button
Registration form: name, email, phone, company, password, confirm fields
Mon Profil header with back button
Profile info section (name, company, email, phone)
Saved cards display with VISA badge and delete buttons
Vehicule & Prix: category select, price input
'Carte de paiement' section with radio button card selector
2 saved Visa cards displayed with selection
'+ Ajouter une autre carte' link to profile

features_verified.GET /api/partner/cards: Returns empty array for new partner, returns saved cards after adding
features_verified.POST /api/partner/cards/setup-intent: Returns Stripe clientSecret for 3DS card verification
features_verified.POST /api/partner/cards/save: Saves card with pm_id and brand, returns card object
features_verified.POST /api/partner/rides: Creates ride using saved card pm_id
features_verified.Driver Profile page (/driver/profile): Shows 'Mes Cartes Bancaires' section with saved cards, add/delete buttons
features_verified.Create Ride page (/driver/new-ride): Shows card selector with saved cards (radio buttons), 'Ajouter une autre carte' link, NO inline Stripe CardElement
features_verified.Login page (/driver/login): Has tabs for Connexion/Inscription, both forms working

critical_code_review_comments: Card management properly moved from CreateRide to Profile page
Profile page uses C# SetupIntent + Stripe Elements correctly
CreateRide now shows radio buttons for saved cards instead of inline Stripe
data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed partners and cards created during pytest
context_for_next_testing_agent: Card management refactoring complete. Cards managed on profile page (/driver/profile) with Stripe Elements. CreateRide (/driver/new-ride) shows saved cards as radio buttons with link to add more. Self-registration creates partner + C# account. All endpoints working with LIVE Stripe keys.

mocked_api.note: No APIs mocked. C# API at api.zont.cab is live. Stripe uses LIVE keys.
